name: Big Jay McNeely
abstract: Cecil James "Big Jay" McNeely (April 29, 1927 – September 16, 2018) was an American R&B saxophonist.

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: The record we just did – it’s Quest for Freedom, we were talking about – that we did with the band from Frankfurt, the HR, Hessian Rundfunk, their area big band, like the Cologne band, McNeely, me, and Richie.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: It was Big Jay McNeely... They were still in high school... So they finally got around to introducing themselves, and I invited them to come over to the Civic Hotel some time
